annotation.text: We need to ground this into a specific context. Something like "When using AI-assisted content generators, like DALL-E or <insert popular AI asset generator here>, maintaining brand consistency can a challenge across many sessions. It's tempting to pursue the perfect prompt. But, that may not be the best way forward.
annotation.anchor: Champion prompts go stale. A population under selection pressure doesn't. The worked example: an agent that builds the review app for the images it generates — in an afternoon.
